---
title: "Nguyen Khoi Quan"
---

learn by teaching. an MD exploring data science, one concept at a time.

- [write](write/index.qmd) — blogs, book reviews, and things i think about
- [learn](learn/index.qmd) — measure, compare, explain, predict
- [dissect](dissect/index.qmd) — paper walkthroughs: journal club meets code review
- [resources](resources.qmd) — curated links
- [about](about.qmd) — who i am
